content: I want to create an expression that calculates the total compensation by adding BaseSalary and Bonus columns

I can help you create an expression to calculate the total compensation.

I don't see columns named "BaseSalary" and "Bonus" in your data. However, I see "Annual Salary", "Scheduled EE Amount", and "Scheduled ER Amount".

Which columns would you like to use to calculate total compensation?
Before we move on to your approval, could you please clarify which columns you would like to use to calculate the total compensation?
